headline: Biogen Ends BIIB122 Parkinsons Trial And Refocuses Neurodegeneration Pipeline
summary: Biogen and Denali Therapeutics have discontinued development of BIIB122 for early-stage Parkinson's disease. The decision follows Phase 2b LUMA trial results, where BIIB122 did not meet efficacy endpoints. The outcome affects Biogen's efforts in neurodegenerative diseases and LRRK2 inhibitor research. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:BIIB, the update comes with the stock trading at $192.23. The shares are up 46.6% over the past year but down 36.4% over three years and down 51.4% over five...

headline: Is COMPASS Pathways (CMPS) Quietly Recalibrating Its Commercialization Strategy With This Board Appointment?
summary: In May 2026, COMPASS Pathways plc elected Kathleen Tregoning to its Board of Directors, with plans for her to join the Compensation and Leadership Development Committee and the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee, alongside issuing new option grants to multiple directors including Tregoning. Tregoning’s background in corporate affairs, commercial strategy and late-stage biotech scaling at Cerevel Therapeutics, Sanofi and Biogen introduces additional commercialization and policy...
